'''Frane''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rutanian]] who was the [[King/Legends|King]] of [[Rutan/Legends|Rutan]] and the father of [[Leed]] and [[Taroon (Rutanian)|Taroon]]. He often had mood swings and could quickly loose his temper.

The laws of Rutan and [[Senali]] required that the kings of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] exchange their firstborn offspring when they were seven years old, in order to avoid a war. When Leed was kidnapped by some accomplices of Taroon, Frane blamed the [[Senali (species)|Senali]], but eventually his son was rescued. Later, Leed, [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] went to Rutan to [[Mission to Rutan|negotiate]] with him where his son should stay. Then, they tried to free [[Yaana]], King [[Meenon]]'s daughter, from Frane's oppressions. After finding Yaana, Frane would not let her go if no Senali stayed on Rutan, so [[Drenna]] volunteered to do it. Finally, King Frane accepted Leed's wish to stay in Senali and agreed with Taroon to be his successor and the future King of Rutan.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
